Class RowsController

java.lang.Object
ui.controllers.RowsController
public class RowsController extends Object
Controller for managing row-related operations within a table. Provides access to rows and columns, and delegates row operations to the Table domain model.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RowsController(Table table)
    Creates a new RowsController for the given table.

    Method

    Returns whether the column at the given index allows blanks.

    Returns the list of columns from the table.

    Requests the creation of a new row in the table.

    Deletes the specified row from the table.
    List<Row>

    Returns the list of rows from the table.

    Toggles the value of a boolean column in the specified row.

  • Constructor Details

    • RowsController

      public RowsController(Table table)
      Creates a new RowsController for the given table.
      Parameters:
      table - the Table to control; must not be null
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if table is null

  • Method Details

    • rowsRequest

      public List<Row> rowsRequest()
      Returns the list of rows from the table.
      Returns:
      a list of Row objects; never null

    • columnsRequest

      public List<Column> columnsRequest()
      Returns the list of columns from the table.
      Returns:
      a list of Column objects; never null

    • handleCreateNewRowRequest

      public void handleCreateNewRowRequest()
      Requests the creation of a new row in the table.

    • typeRequest

      public ColumnType typeRequest(int colIndex)
      Returns the type of the column at the given index.
      Parameters:
      colIndex - the column index; must be valid
      Returns:
      the type of the column at the given index

    • columnAllowsBlanks

      public boolean columnAllowsBlanks(int colIndex)
      Returns whether the column at the given index allows blanks.
      Parameters:
      colIndex - the column index; must be valid
      Returns:
      true if the column allows blank values, false otherwise

    • handleDeleteRowRequest

      public void handleDeleteRowRequest(Row row)
      Deletes the specified row from the table.
      Parameters:
      row - the Row to delete; must not be null
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if row is null

    • getTable

      public Table getTable()

    • toggleValue

      public void toggleValue(Row row, int columnIndex, String value)
      Toggles the value of a boolean column in the specified row.
      Parameters:
      row - the Row to modify; must not be null
      columnIndex - the index of the column to toggle; must be valid
      value - the new value to set; must not be null
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if row or value is null
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if columnIndex is out of range
